---
title: "Research"
engine: markdown
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

## Research interests

- **Development economics** — household behaviour in low-income agricultural economies
- **Social protection** — cash transfers and their effects on welfare and human capital
- **Economics of child labour** — measurement, drivers, and policy responses
- **Applied microeconometrics** — impact evaluation and causal inference in the field

<!-- Edit the themes above to match how you'd describe your own agenda. -->


## Working papers

### Unconditional cash transfers and child labour in Ghana
*with [co-authors]* · Draft available on request

A randomized evaluation of a one-off unconditional cash transfer to
cocoa-farming households in Ghana, tracking children's labour, schooling, and
household decisions across survey rounds.

> **Abstract.** *Add a 3–4 sentence abstract here.*

[Draft (PDF)](#){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm} &nbsp;
[Slides](#){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm} &nbsp;
[Pre-registration](#){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

<!--
Duplicate the block above for each paper. Once a paper is public, replace the
'#' links with real URLs (working-paper series, OSF/AEA RCT registry, etc.).
-->


## Work in progress

- *Project title* — one-line description of the question and stage.
- *Project title* — one-line description of the question and stage.


## Pre-PhD / other work

Use this section for policy reports, master's thesis, or pre-doctoral work you
want visible but separate from the main agenda.
